typography.instructions: DO NOT use Inter or Roboto. Use Cormorant Garamond for all primary headings, KPIs, and dashboard large numbers to give a boutique ledger feel. Use Outfit for tables, forms, and small text. Ensure all headings have tight tracking (`tracking-tight`).

colors.instructions: Use #FDFBF7 for the main app background to simulate high-quality paper. Surfaces (cards/tables) should be pure white with a 1px border (#E8E4D9). Use the Primary Terracotta (#C55B43) sparingly for CTAs, active states, and key chart elements. Profit/Balance numbers should use the Deep Forest Green (#3A5A40) for success, never standard neon green.

visual_enhancers.texture: Apply a subtle SVG noise/grain overlay fixed to the body background with opacity 20% to give a tactile paper feel.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Avoid heavy or dark drop shadows. Use subtle, warm ambient shadows: `shadow-[0_4px_20px_-4px_rgba(44,42,41,0.05)]`.
visual_enhancers.borders: Soft roundness. Maximum border-radius of 8px (`rounded-md` or `rounded-lg`). Maintain 1px solid borders on cards using the #E8E4D9 color.

grids_and_layouts.dashboard: Use the High Density Bento Grid. Base grid `grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4`. Gap `gap-6`. KPIs (`col-span-1`), Main charts (`col-span-2` or `col-span-3`), Recent Transactions (`col-span-1` or `col-span-2`).
grids_and_layouts.spacing: Generous spacing. Use `p-6` or `p-8` inside all cards. Add extra padding (`pt-12`) around the main container.
grids_and_layouts.alignment: Left-align paragraph/label text. Right-align all numerical data in tables (Rate, Qty, Amount, Profit, Balance). Optical alignment for icons.

component_guidelines.tables: Minimalist accounting tables. Sticky header with a subtle background (`#F5F3EC`). Remove vertical borders, use subtle bottom borders (`border-b border-[#E8E4D9]`) for rows. Right-align monetary columns. Add subtle hover state to rows (`hover:bg-[#FDFBF7]`).
component_guidelines.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border, no initial shadow. On hover, apply a slight lift (`-translate-y-0.5`) and subtle shadow.
component_guidelines.forms: Use Shadcn customized components. Input backgrounds should be `#FFFFFF` with `#E8E4D9` border. Focus ring should be 2px of the Terracotta primary (`focus:ring-[#C55B43]/30`).
component_guidelines.charts: Use Recharts. Colors: Terracotta, Warm Ochre, Sage Green, Stone. No grid lines except a subtle horizontal axis line. Tooltips must match the card styling (white bg, 1px border, shadow-md).

motion.hover_states: All buttons must transition background color and slightly scale down (`active:scale-95`).
motion.transitions: Use `transition-colors duration-200 ease-in-out` or specific property transitions, NOT `transition-all`.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over the primary Terracotta button is pure white. Muted text must maintain at least 4.5:1 ratio against the off-white background.
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="add-transaction-btn"`, `data-testid="net-profit-kpi"`).

universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: You have .js files not .tsx files, ensure all component generation and Shadcn integration uses .js/.jsx syntax. Remove TypeScript interfaces and types when copying Shadcn components.
DO NOT use generic centered layouts or simplistic gradients. Maintain left alignment for content readability.
DO NOT use complete `transparent` background in header, overlays, or any surface with content underneath. Use glassmorphism or solid fills.
Incorporate the fonts Cormorant Garamond and Outfit via Google Fonts in index.css or index.html.
Build the dashboard using standard pure Tailwind classes and HTML structural elements, but utilize Shadcn for Select, Tables, Inputs, DatePicker, Dialogs.
Use Recharts for the monthly sales trend line and category-wise profit donut chart.
Export to CSV logic should be clean vanilla JS utilizing Blob and URL.createObjectURL.
Format monetary values using `Intl.NumberFormat('en-IN', { style: 'currency', currency: 'INR' })` (assuming INR based on RHUF/UPI context).
